instructions: Extend the `AgentDirective` model to include `verification_commands: list[str] = []` and `completion_criteria: list[str] = []`. Extend the `PhaseReport` model to include `verification_output: str = ""` so the agent can prove it ran the commands. Maintain `ConfigDict(frozen=True, strict=True)` and Pydantic V2 compatibility.
anti_patterns: Do not remove or alter existing fields in `AgentDirective` or `PhaseReport`.
Do not import dependencies outside of the standard library and Pydantic.

instructions: Update the `ContextCompiler` to generate a new 'Definition of Done' section in the Markdown payload. This section must list the `completion_criteria` and explicitly instruct the agent to run the `verification_commands`. The compiler must automatically inject `just verify-fast` as a mandatory verification command even if the directive does not explicitly request it.
anti_patterns: Do not break the existing Execution Environment injection built in Epic 4.5.

instructions: Write comprehensive tests in `tests/models/test_core.py` and `tests/core/test_compiler.py` to cover the new fields and the compiler's auto-injection of `just verify-fast`. Run `just verify-fast` to ensure 100% coverage and strict type adherence before reporting success.
anti_patterns: Do not report SUCCESS if code coverage drops below 100% or if Pyright throws any strict-mode errors.
